text.title: Conversational Build Procedure
text.summary: Five-step build from validated config to a running conversational runner with dual termination + budget audit.

section.title: Procedure
section.code:
STEP 1 — Configure input: ConversationalAgents config (agents, termination_phrase, max_turns, window_size, token_budget) action: validate via scripts/validate-multi-agent-conversational.py output: instance ready to run gate: validator exits 0
STEP 2 — Start input: initial user message action: append {speaker:"user", content, ts} to conversation log output: conversation primed gate: token_budget > 0
STEP 3 — Turn loop action: for turn in 1..max_turns: pick speaker (round-robin); build prompt = system_prompt + window(last N) + last_message; call LLM; append {speaker, content, tokens_used, ts} to log; used += tokens_used; IF termination_phrase in content OR used >= 0.9*token_budget: break output: full conversation log gate: loop exits via phrase OR budget OR max_turns (not silent runaway)
STEP 4 — Emit trace action: write trace.json {config, log, used_tokens, exit_reason: phrase|budget|max_turns} output: replayable trace gate: exit_reason set
STEP 5 — Final extraction action: if exit_reason==phrase: extract the JSON / answer block from the last turn; else: return best-of-window output: structured final_result gate: final_result not null
